subject: Sports
title: Duke vs North Carolina: Basketball's Best Feud
description: A quick, practical guide to Duke vs North Carolina: Basketball's Best Feud.

hook.text: Eight miles apart in North Carolina. Two basketball programs that have produced more legends than any other.

buildup.text: Duke and UNC have combined for 11 NCAA championships. The talent pipeline is unmatched in college basketball.

discovery.text: Coach K at Duke and Dean Smith at UNC built empires. Michael Jordan played for UNC; Grant Hill played for Duke.

twist.text: In 2022, they met in the Final Four for the first time ever—Coach K's final season. UNC won and ended his career.

climax.text: Tobacco Road's basketball rivalry defines March Madness and remains the purest expression of college sports.

punchline.text: Eight miles apart, eleven titles between them. College basketball's greatest feud.

quiz.question: What happened in the 2022 Duke vs UNC Final Four game?
options: UNC won, ending Coach K's coaching career
Duke won its sixth national title
The game went to triple overtime
